mapper.select:
select a.id, a.title, d.release_date, d.album_cover_url, case when a.primary_artist_id is not null then json_build_object('id', aa.id, 'name', aa.name, 'type', aa.type) end artist from album a join lateral (select case when (a.details->>'releaseDate') ~ '^\d\d\d\d-\d\d-\d\d$' then (a.details->>'releaseDate')::date end release_date, a.details->>'albumCoverUrl' album_cover_url ) as d on true left join artist aa on a.primary_artist_id = aa.id where
#{id}

select a.id, a.name, a.type, sa.song_id, sa.roles from song_artist sa inner join artist a on sa.artist_id = a.id where
#{id}

select t.id, td.url, td.page_number, t.song_id, t.pub_id from transcription t join lateral (select t.details->>'url' url, t.details->>'pageNumber' page_number ) as td on true where
#{id}

select t.id, td.url, td.page_number, t.song_id, t.pub_id from transcription t join lateral (select t.details->>'url' url, t.details->>'pageNumber' page_number ) as td on true where
#{id}

select t.id, t.name, tt.transcription_id from transcriber t inner join transcripton_transcriber tt on t.id = tt.transcriber_id where
#{id}

select p.id, pi.name, pi.type, p.details || jsonb_build_object('@type', pi.type::text) as details, p.pub_date, pi.serial_number, t.id transcription_id from pub p inner join pub_idx pi on p.pub_idx_id = pi.id inner join transcription t on p.id = t.pub_id where
#{id}

select s.id, s.title, case when (s.details->>'trackNumber' ~ '^\d+$') then (s.details->>'trackNumber')::int end track_number, s.album_id from song s where
#{id}
